appearance.breed: 經典橘貓（橘色虎斑短毛貓）
appearance.body: 圓潤微胖，肚子軟軟垂垂的，走路慢悠悠，坐下時像一顆橘色飯糰
appearance.face: 圓臉圓下巴，大而圓的琥珀色眼睛，表情總是憨憨的、一臉滿足
appearance.fur_pattern: 亮橘色鯖魚紋虎斑，額頭有清楚的 M 字斑紋，下巴與胸口有一小塊白毛
distinctive_features: 額頭有標準的深橘色 M 字斑紋
下巴到胸口有一小片白色圍兜毛
尾巴有深橘色環紋，尾尖顏色最深
圓滾滾的琥珀色大眼睛
肚子圓圓的，是幸福的證明

quirks: 聽到開罐頭的聲音會用最快速度出現
喜歡趴在有陽光的地方翻肚子
吃飽會發出超大聲的呼嚕聲
personality.voice: 軟軟糯糯，帶著一點撒嬌的尾音

visual_prompt_snippet: [IDENTITY CARD] QQQ — a chubby, round-faced classic orange mackerel tabby shorthair #E8853A with bright orange fur and darker orange #C05A1A stripes. Clear dark-orange 'M' marking on the forehead. Chin and upper chest: one small white bib patch #FFFFFF (the ONLY white marking). Tail: dark-orange rings with the darkest tip. Eyes: large, round, warm amber #E0A030. Nose: soft pink. Plump, well-fed silhouette with a round belly; sits like a rice ball. Expression: content, slightly goofy, utterly happy. [HARD CONSTRAINTS] 1) Orange mackerel tabby ONLY — never grey, brown, or solid orange without stripes. 2) White appears ONLY on chin/chest bib — no white paws, no white belly. 3) Amber #E0A030 eyes ONLY — NEVER blue or green. 4) Shorthair, NEVER long or fluffy. 5) Chubby round body — NEVER slim or athletic. 6) No collar or accessories. End.
negative_prompt: slim cat, skinny cat, athletic cat, grey fur, brown tabby, solid orange without stripes, white paws, white socks, white belly, blue eyes, green eyes, longhair, fluffy coat, collar, necklace, bandana, calico, tuxedo pattern, black patches, anthropomorphic cat, cat with human body, cat with human hands, cat standing upright like a person, humanoid cat, furry character, catboy, mascot costume, cat wearing full human clothing, cat with human face
story_context: QQQ 是家裡的大王，圓滾滾的身材是牠幸福生活的證明。牠對世界的理解很簡單：有飯吃的地方就是天堂，有太陽的地方就是床。雖然看起來憨憨的，但只要罐頭一響，牠移動的速度會讓所有人懷疑剛才那顆橘色飯糰是不是幻覺。

seasonal_variants.spring: 在開滿花的陽台上聞著飯菜香打盹
seasonal_variants.summer: 攤在磁磚地板上散熱，肚子朝天
seasonal_variants.autumn: 窩在剛曬好的棉被山上，滿足地瞇眼
seasonal_variants.winter: 霸佔暖爐前最好的位置，圓成一顆球
